chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. Nos.D-5358/2019 & 2580/2021 Mst. Atiiya Siddiqui & others AND Noman Ahmed Khan & others Versus B.I.E.K & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of stay applications. 2. For hearing of main cases. Dated: 05.05.2025 None present. -.-.- These are old matters of 2019 and 2021, which are six and four years old respectively. These were last taken up about four years ago. Learned counsels for the petitioners have not pursued these petitions diligently during last fours years. Today also learned counsels for the petitioners in both the petitions are called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing these old petitions, which are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the connected petition. Head of Const. Benches Judge
